action.text:
Dim ent As AcadEntity
If (InStr(LCase(ent.Layer), 'layer name') > 0) Then
End If

Dim ent As AcadEntity
If (TypeOf ent Is <AcadLWPolyline, AcadArc, AcadLine, AcadBlockReference>) Then
End If

Dim lay As AcadLayer
For Each lay In ThisDrawing.Layers
	If (lay.Name = 'layerName') Then
	End If
Next lay

Dim lay As AcadLayer
Set lay = ThisDrawing.Layers.Add('newLayerName')
lay.LayerOn = True
lay.Freeze = False

Dim p1(0 To 2) As Double, p2(0 To 2) As Double
p1(0) = x1: p1(1) = y1
p2(0) = x2: p2(1) = y2
Dim l As AcadLine
Set l = ThisDrawing.ModelSpace.AddLine(p1, p2)
ThisDrawing.Regen acAllViewports
l.Layer = 'layerName'

Dim pts(0 To 7) As Double
pts(0) = x1: pts(1) = y1
pts(2) = x2: pts(3) = y2
pts(4) = x3: pts(5) = y3
pts(6) = x4: pts(7) = y4
Dim pl As AcadLWPolyline
Set pl = ThisDrawing.ModelSpace.AddLightWeightPolyline(pts)
pl.Closed = True
pl.Layer = 'layerName'

Dim c(0 To 2) As Double: Dim r As Double: Dim startAngle As Double: Dim endAngle As Double
c(0) = xPos: c(1) = yPos: c(2) = 0: r = Radius: startAngle = ang1: endAngle = ang2
Dim arc As AcadArc
Set arc = ThisDrawing.ModelSpace.AddArc(c, r, startAngle, endAngle)
ThisDrawing.Regen acAllViewports
arc.Layer = 'layerName'

Dim ent As AcadEntity
Dim ss As AcadSelectionSet
Set ss = ThisDrawing.SelectionSets.Add('LoopSS')
ss.Clear
ThisDrawing.SetVariable 'MODEMACRO', 'Select entities belonging to current loop (shift + click to deselect). RightClick/Enter = finish selection'
ss.SelectOnScreen
ThisDrawing.SetVariable 'MODEMACRO', ''
If ss.Count <> 0 Then
	For Each ent In ss
		code
	Next ent
End If

Dim cir As AcadCircle
Dim center(0 To 2) As Double
Dim radius As Double
center(0) = x: center(1) = y: center(2) = 0: radius = r
Set cir = ThisDrawing.ModelSpace.AddCircle(center, radius)
ThisDrawing.Regen acAllViewports
arc.Layer = 'layerName'
